repo_mismatches: Prompt referenced a 32-week / 224-day plan, but the current canonical syllabus contains 29 active weeks and 203 active day records.
Prompt referenced overview.md and flashcard_info.md, but those files are not present in the repo.

primary_ranges.secondary: Bridge to CompTIA Network+ (N10-009) and CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701)
